name: Shandong Hiking International Co.,Ltd
summary: Shandong Hiking International Co.,Ltd engages in the international trading business. The company offers hair products, textiles, clothing, diamonds, knitwear, and aquatic products. It also invests in container manufacturing, financial trust, nonferrous metals, hotel, bad debt assets acquisition and disposition, and other businesses. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Qingdao, China.
